title: Senior Finance Executive
description:
Job responsibilities:

Accounting and financial reporting

  • Handle preparation of full set of accounts including posting journal entries, preparation of P&L and balance sheet schedules, accurate and timely transaction bookings of monthly expenditure, payroll, fixed assets, accruals etc.
  • Assist in month end, quarter end and year end close by preparing financial reporting according to local and corporate requirements
  • Assists project cost analytics and reporting
  • Prepare bank reconciliations
  • Prepare monthly and quarterly cashflow forecast
  • Assist in forecasting and budgeting exercise
  • Maintenance of accounting system

Audit, tax and banking matters

  • Handle inquiries from internal and external auditors, tax agent, tax authorities
  • Prepare detailed financial statement, audit schedules and audit-related documentations
  • Prepare and submit quarterly GST reports, annual income tax filing, withholding tax, etc
  • Liaise with company secretary for corporate finance matters
  • Liaise with bankers for letter of credit, banker’s guarantee, performance bond, respond to bank inquiries

Sales operations

  • Perform invoicing and collection matching to accounts receivables
  • Prepare sales orders, revenue, margin and backlog tracking reports
  • Prepare Accounts Receivables Aging report and monitoring

Accounts Payable

  • Process payments in an accurate and timely manner
  • Process invoices with 3 ways match, ensuring accurate matching between invoice, PO and GRN, handle miscellaneous invoices
  • Proper filing and documentation of payment vouchers
  • Review AP aging reports, follow up on vendors' Statements of Accounts and audit confirmations
  • Ensure inter-company transactions and balances are tracked and reconciled
  • Validate and process monthly expense claims for employees

Undertake special assignments and project requirements as needed.

Requirements:

  • Min. Diploma in Accountancy or ACCA/CPA equivalent
  • Preferably with working experience in handling full set account and in-depth knowledge of Singapore Financial Reporting Standards (SFRS), and Income Tax Acts (ITA)
  • Experience in project costing
  • Experience in GST and withholding tax is an added advantage
  • Proficient in MS Office, especially MS Excel and MS PowerPoint
  • Good accounting system knowledge
  • Exceptional attention to detail and the ability to meet tight deadlines
  • Immediate availability or ability to start work within a short period is advantageous.

postedCompany.description:
HOLLYSYS (ASIA PACIFIC) PTE. LTD. 

Established in 1993, HollySys stands as a premier provider of intelligent solutions.

HollySys' business encompasses Industrial Intelligence, Transport Intelligence, and Food & Pharmaceutical Intelligence, operatingl through business centers in Singapore, China, India, Indonesia, the Middle East and Central Asia. With a steadfast commitment to continuous innovation and R&D since its inception, HollySys has been at the forefront of shaping intelligent solutions across diverse industries. Rooted in the belief of "Intelligence For Excellence", our dedication revolves around delivering intelligent manufacturing products and solutions, centered on control and safety systems, complemented by instrumentation, industrial software, and full lifecycle and training services. Committed to transforming industries through innovation and excellence in intelligence, HollySys is your trusted partner on the path to heightened efficiency and technological advancement.
